name: Scandinavian Real Heart AB (Publ)
summary: Scandinavian Real Heart AB (Publ) designs and develops an artificial heart. The company engages in developing total artificial heart that provides solutions to patients diagnosed with advanced congestive heart failure. It also develops Realheart VAD, Realheart PulsePump, and Realheart Sternal prosthetic products. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in V√É¬§ster√É¬•s, Sweden.
